TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Siljevavav, title = Siljevavav, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Siljevavav} }

S.FORM: alang Siljevavav ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 100 buwan, 341 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 331 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 90%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Siljevavav hya' ga Tjuwaqau. tay 'llaw na Siljevavav hya' ga Tjana'asiya. tay 'zil na Siljevavav hya' ga Kuljaljau. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Siljevavav ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 100 buwan, 341 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 331 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 90%, Amis 1%, Tayan 1%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Siljevavav hya' ga Tjuwaqau. tay 'llaw na Siljevavav hya' ga Tjana'asiya. tay 'zil na Siljevavav hya' ga Kuljaljau. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ s~Й•ilje*a*a* ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku Д§eto keЕ‹ atu lajЙЈi ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa *% kjan ku ** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, pajwan **%, amis~Й• *%, tajan *%, ОІunun *%, s~Й•ajs~Й•ijat *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj mkrajaК” na s~Й•ilje*a*a* Д§jaК” ЙЈa tjuwaqau. taj К”llaw na s~Й•ilje*a*a* Д§jaК” ЙЈa tjanaК”as~Й•ija. taj К”zil na s~Й•ilje*a*a* Д§jaК” ЙЈa kuljaljau. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj. pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
